description_long: This is a large, cylindrical barrel with a polygonal, slightly faceted structure and a warm, tan coloration. The surface is covered with a triangular grid pattern, suggesting a reinforced or composite material construction. Around the upper and lower thirds of the barrel, there are visible horizontal bands that appear to provide structural reinforcement. One side of the barrel features a prominent red warning label with a yellow triangle and exclamation mark, indicating hazardous contents or caution. The top of the barrel is closed with a matching lid, which has a central circular detail, possibly a bung or access port. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for industrial or urban use, likely for storage or containment of materials.
description: A large, tan, polygonal barrel with grid-patterned surface, reinforced bands, and a red warning label on one side. The top is sealed with a matching lid featuring a central detail.
description_view_0: Shows the barrel's polygonal shape, grid pattern, and closed lid with a central circular detail; no warning label visible.
description_view_1: Reveals part of the red warning label on the side, along with the reinforced bands and grid texture.
description_view_2: Displays the full red warning label with a yellow caution symbol, as well as the structural bands and grid pattern.
description_view_3: Shows the opposite side of the barrel with no label visible, highlighting the continuous grid pattern and banding.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: plastic reinforcement rings at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: red warning label with yellow caution symbol
